use_codes.desc: METHOD FOR TREATING HYPERPARATHYROIDISM WHICH COMPRISES SUPPRESSING PARATHYROID ACTIVITY
PREVENTION AND TREATMENT OF SECONDARY HYPERPARATHYROIDISM ASSOCIATED WITH CHRONIC KIDNEY DISEASE (CKD) STAGE 5, WHICH MAY RESULT IN RENAL OSTEODYSTROPHY, WHILE AVOIDING HYPERPHOSPHATEMIA
